description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs `yarn global add codecov` and then `yarn` to install dependencies. Define a single stage called test and a job named test that runs in this stage, executing `yarn unit && codecov -t $CODECOV_TOKEN`. The pipeline does not produce any artifacts, has no special rules, and relies on the CODECOV_TOKEN secret.
